overview.short: Chavand is a hill fortress situated 30 km from the modern-day town of Naryangoan in Junnar Taluka of Pune district in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Chavand is a hill fortress situated 30 km from the modern-day town of Naryangoan in Junnar Taluka of Pune district in Maharashtra, India. The fort, which rises 1,036 meters (3,399 feet) above sea level, is located in the Sahyadri mountain range. The fort was looted and destroyed by the British upon siege. This is one of the forts known as the 'Famous 5'.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Manikdoh Dam
topPlaces.description: Manikdoh Dam, is a gravity dam on Kukadi River near Junnar, Pune district in state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Kusur, Mawal
topPlaces.description: Kusur is a village in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 1,714 ha (4,235 acres).

topPlaces.name: Ghatghar
topPlaces.description: Ghatghar is a hill station and small town in the Pune district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is a town located at a higher elevation of Deccan Plateau and Naneghat valley.

topPlaces.name: Jivdhan
topPlaces.description: Jivdhan (or Jeevdhan) is a hill fortress situated 1 km from modern town of Ghatghar in Junnar Taluka of Pune district in Maharashtra, India. The fort, which rises 1,145 meters (3,757 feet) above sea level, is located in the Sahyadri mountain range.

topPlaces.name: Tulja Caves
topPlaces.description: Tulja Caves (Tulja Lena) are located beyond the Shivneri hill, about 4 km to the west of Junnar, India. Other caves surrounding the city of Junnar are: Manmodi Caves, Shivneri Caves and Lenyadri caves.

topPlaces.name: Naneghat
topPlaces.description: Naneghat, also referred to as Nanaghat or Nana Ghat (IAST: Nānāghaṭ), is a mountain pass in the Western Ghats range between the Konkan coast and the ancient town of Junnar in the Deccan plateau. The pass is about 120 kilometres (75 mi) north of Pune and about 165 kilometres (103 mi) east from Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Manikdoh Dam, is a gravity dam on Kukadi River near Junnar, Pune district in state of Maharashtra in India.
Kusur is a village in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 1,714 ha (4,235 acres).
Ghatghar is a hill station and small town in the Pune district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is a town located at a higher elevation of Deccan Plateau and Naneghat valley.

Jivdhan (or Jeevdhan) is a hill fortress situated 1 km from modern town of Ghatghar in Junnar Taluka of Pune district in Maharashtra, India. The fort, which rises 1,145 meters (3,757 feet) above sea level, is located in the Sahyadri mountain range.

Tulja Caves (Tulja Lena) are located beyond the Shivneri hill, about 4 km to the west of Junnar, India. Other caves surrounding the city of Junnar are: Manmodi Caves, Shivneri Caves and Lenyadri caves.

Naneghat, also referred to as Nanaghat or Nana Ghat (IAST: Nānāghaṭ), is a mountain pass in the Western Ghats range between the Konkan coast and the ancient town of Junnar in the Deccan plateau. The pass is about 120 kilometres (75 mi) north of Pune and about 165 kilometres (103 mi) east from Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chavand?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chavand is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chavand?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chavand at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chavand?
faq.a: Stays in Chavand start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chavand?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manikdoh Dam, Kusur, Mawal, Ghatghar, Jivdhan, Tulja Caves.
